{{Infobox concept
| name = Children of the Dead Mother
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Children of the Dead Mother Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Children]] of the [[Dead Mother]], also known as the [[Dead Mother]]’s [[Children]], are undead entities born from the power of [[Nakothi]]. These creatures are formed when [[Nakothi]]’s energy infuses human remains, resulting in bodies that possess power similar to an object invested with [[Intent]]. Historically, during the era of the [[Elders]], [[Nakothi]] shaped these beings into specialized workers using human parts. While many do not survive the process, those that do can emerge with extraordinary abilities. The physical appearance of these creatures varies. They have been described as desiccated, sand-colored husks or skeletal forms with sharpened bone feet. Some manifestations include creatures with fleshy tentacles or jointed, alien limbs. A specific class of these beings is the [[Handmaiden of the Dead Mother]]; unlike the standard drones, [[Handmaidens]] possess cruel intelligence and serve as overseers or managers who select specific human parts for [[Nakothi]]'s purposes. Exposure to a [[Handmaiden]]'s gaze is known to cause madness. The [[Children]] are often found swarming from tunnels within the crater of the [[island]] formed by [[Nakothi]]'s fallen corpse. Their strength and presence increase as the [[Dead Mother]] herself draws closer. They are considered a significant threat to the living, appearing in massive numbers that can overwhelm human forces.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] fought against the [[Dead Mother]]’s [[Children]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children of the Dead Mother]] swarmed [[Urzaia]] and the blond [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children of the Dead Mother]] are a group that attacked [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children]] of the [[Dead Mother]] are a group of monsters that haunt the tunnels on [[Nakothi's island]]. These creatures are born when [[Nakothi]]'s power embeds itself into human remains, causing those killed by her released powers to be reborn as these entities. Composed of hosts for [[Nakothi]], the monsters utilize bone claws and fleshy tails to climb. This group is ultimately directed by [[Nakothi]]'s [[Handmaiden]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of the Dead Mother]] are monsters that haunt [[Nakothi's island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of the Dead Mother]] haunted the tunnels on the [[island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]]'s [[Children]] are born from [[Nakothi]]'s power embedding in human remains.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|People killed by [[Nakothi]]'s released powers are reborn as [[Children of the Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of the Dead Mother]] are a group on [[Nakothi's island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The children of the [[Dead Mother]] consist of hosts of [[Nakothi]] that use fleshy tails and claws of bone to climb.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Children of the Dead Mother]] are directed by [[Nakothi]]’s [[Handmaiden]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The fight with the [[Dead Mother]]’s [[Children]] occurred five days ago.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] has fought the [[Children of the Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Children of the Dead Mother]] are swarming during a battle.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
